home.heroSubtitle: Kayak rental in Asveja Regional Park. Paddle, relax, and discover the most beautiful river bends.
home.fleetTitle: River adventures for your whole crew
home.fleetDesc: Around 200 kayaks available bring your whole crew along at once.
home.pricingNote: Prices per day · public holidays billed at Fri–Sat rate

routes.title: Unforgettable Kayaking Adventures
routes.lede: Regional park routes that inspire you to move. Find your path through tranquil lakes and vibrant forest rivers.

route.flat: calm and glassy, perfect for all ability levels
route.currentTerrain: {terrain}, making this a route for paddlers with some experience
route.terrainDesc: The current is {desc}. Sandy banks appear at regular intervals perfect for a mid-river picnic, a swim, or simply drifting beneath the trees.

fleet.title: River adventures for your whole crew
fleet.desc: 200+ vessels for water adventures and shore relaxation. Everything you need for a great trip.

kayak.title: Kayak rent
kayak.desc: Comfortable kayaks, perfectly suited for short and long trips.

raft.title: Raft rent
raft.desc: Roomy rafts for journeys and corporate retreats.

sup.title: SUP rent
sup.desc: Stable and easy-to-use paddleboards, perfect for a relaxing time on the water.

hotTub.title: Mobile hot tub
hotTub.desc: Heated hot tub right by the water with cozy LED lighting for your evening swim.

sauna.title: Mobile sauna
sauna.desc: Wood-fired sauna on the lake shore—the perfect place to warm up and relax.

footer.tagline: Adventure, tranquillity and profound stillness on the water of the regional park.

reservation.modalSubtitle: After completing your reservation, our administrator will contact you to confirm and arrange payment details.
reservation.successBody: We'll be in touch about your order.
reservation.termsBody:
1. Rented equipment may only be used for water trips in safe weather conditions.
2. Equipment must be returned clean and undamaged. The renter is fully liable for any damage or loss.
3. Children under 12 must wear an appropriately sized life vest throughout the trip.
4. It is strictly prohibited to paddle under the influence of alcohol or narcotics.
5. The rental company is not responsible for renters' health or safety on the water.
6. Cancellations made less than 24 hours before departure are non-refundable.
